artifact_inventory.note: No files were deleted or merged by inventory.

invalidated_results: DSS-004C coarse matched-baseline interpretation as comparable matched baseline

dss_004c.entry_exit_costs: Signal t, entry next open, exit 10-session close, x2 round-trip 20 bps.
dss_004c.matched_sample: Approximate year-level count per symbol using count // len(frames), not exact base symbol-year counts.

dss_004c_a.baselines: Same named baselines, but the matched population differs.
dss_004c_a.entry_exit_costs: Signal t, entry next open, exit 10-session close, x2 round-trip 20 bps.
dss_004c_a.matched_sample: Exact DSS-BO-001 symbol-year counts sampled from each baseline before non-overlap trade construction.

fields_checked.overlap: Overlapping trades per symbol are de-duplicated after candidate sampling.
fields_checked.universe: Operational symbols from DSS-003D checked universe; SPY/QQQ benchmark only.

method_diff.probable_cause: DSS-004C used a coarse per-year sampler that divided total yearly base trades across all symbols; DSS-004C-A used exact base symbol-year counts. The sample definition changed, so matched baselines are not comparable.

next_phase: Director decision; if continuing, audit CONTRACTION_ONLY as separate provisional DSS-CO-001. Do not execute yet.

side_by_side_summary.matching: Exact symbol-year counts from DSS-BO-001 base trades; deterministic spread sample; random baseline uses fixed seed.

valid_results: DSS-004C-A exact symbol-year matched recompute when interpreted as matched-sample evidence
